fields.title: Add detached mode-agent regression tests
fields.description: Plan: detached mode-agent capabilities. Add failing tests that lock the new contract: smart/deep/rush inherit prompt+model only, exclude memory by default, default to worker-safe sandbox presets, accept tools/sandbox/spawns overrides in agents settings, and reject memory in worker tool allowlists.
fields.notes: Final re-review: PASS. Reviewed the 4 requested test files. New coverage stays in test files, encodes all six contract points, and the added regressions fail against current implementation for the expected capability/sandbox gaps.
fields.close_reason: Added failing regression tests for detached mode-agent defaults and got spec+quality approval.
